# Kar Bhala Ho Bhala

> Kar Bhala Ho Bhala is a registered charitable trust based near PGI Chandigarh, India, that provides free medicines, food, accommodation, financial aid, and emotional support to poor and underprivileged patients seeking medical treatment.

## About
- Founded to help patients who travel to PGI Chandigarh for treatment but cannot afford medicines, food, accommodation, or transport.
- Registered Trust (Registration No. XXXX/2018), 12A registered, 80G certified for tax-exempt donations under Indian Income Tax Act.
- Tagline: "Seva Hi Pooja Hai" (Service is Worship).
- 8+ years of service, 5000+ patients helped, 10000+ medicines distributed, 200+ active volunteers.

## Services
- Free diagnosis support: help with medical reports, consultations, second opinions
- Medication assistance: free and subsidized medicines
- Food & nutrition: daily meals for patients and attendants
- Financial aid: support for hospital bills and emergency treatment
- Accommodation help: temporary stay for outstation families
- Emotional support: volunteer counseling for patients and families

## How to Donate
- UPI: 9473093492@axl
- Bank transfer details available on the donation page
- Donors receive an 80G tax-exemption eligible receipt (PDF) generated instantly on the website using their name, amount, and UPI/bank transaction ID
- Monthly recurring donation option available with WhatsApp reminders

## How to Get Help
- Patients or families near PGI Chandigarh can submit a "Request Help" form on the website with patient name, ward number, and details of assistance needed.
- The volunteer team reviews and responds within hours.

## How to Volunteer
- Roles available: Medical Volunteer, Support Runner, Counselor, Community Volunteer
- Apply via the volunteer form on the website; approved volunteers are added to a WhatsApp coordination group.

## Location & Contact
- Location: Near PGI Chandigarh (Post Graduate Institute of Medical Education and Research), Chandigarh, India
- Phone: +91 9473093492
- Email: s2009.saransh@gmail.com

## Languages
- The website is available in English, Hindi, and Punjabi.
